calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Revocation Of The 515 Valencia Rev. Trust 2015 And To Compel Prior Trustee Edward Duran To Sign The Trust Transfer Deed Removing
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Weinberg appeared by telephone for Raul Duran (Petitioner).
Eve Jacklin for and with Edward Duran (Respondent).

Ms. Jacklin stated that the trust transferring the deed was signed, that the trust was revoked without any opposition, that the issue of the deed and the issue of revocation are moot, that there is no venue in San Francisco and that the trust is being administered in San Mateo. Ms. Jacklin also stated that her Client raised concern with signing the deed as Trustee when he was no longer the Trustee, stated that her Client was threatened to be sued by opposing Counsel, that Mr. Weinberg is not dealing in good faith and raised the issue of opposing Counsel's fees. Mr. Weinberg stated that the former Trustee had authority to transfer the property back into the trust under Probate Code 15644 and made reference to Leader v. Cords Cal.App4th 1588. The Petition to Confirm Revocation of The 515 Valencia Revocable Trust 2015, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Revocation Of The 515 Valencia Rev. Trust 2015 And To Compel Prior Trustee Edward Duran To Sign The Trust Transfer Deed Removing
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
